node.text: Dave restored and modified a car himself, adding a custom exhaust and performance upgrades.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "working on cars") on Observation 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Working on cars is like therapy for Dave and a way to get away from everyday stress. He sees it as more than a hobby, but a passion.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "working on cars") on Observation 3 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave helped his neighbor fix a car engine which he found a therapeutic and relaxing experience.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "working on cars") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave has fond memories of restoring an old car with his dad during one summer, finding it hard work but satisfying.

node.text: Dave finds fixing cars like therapy and feels fulfilled by refurbishing them, stemming from working on cars with his dad.
